title: Nemo's Transit Expansion
description: Various experimental addon functionalities made by Zbx1425 for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod.
body:
⚠️ 本模组**不**兼容 **MTR 4**，请配合 MTR 3.2.2 使用。  
⚠️ This mod is **NOT** compatible with **MTR 4**. Please use this mod with MTR 3.2.2.

**使用前请您先阅读 [此文档](https://www.zbx1425.cn/nautilus/mtr-nte/#/) 。**  
**Make sure you read our introduction at [HERE](https://www.zbx1425.cn/nautilus/mtr-nte/#/) .**

![Feature Grid Image](https://www.zbx1425.cn/nautilus/mtr-nte/img/featgrid.jpg)

---
Nemo's Transit Expansion includes some experimental extension functionalities to the Minecraft Transit Mod.  
As a contributor to MTR's development, the author hopes to initially release, exhibit and experiment with these new features with this medium, and later merge its stable aspects into the MTR mod itself.

本模组 NTE（Nemo's Transit Expansion, 纸板箱的交通扩展）包含一些由 Zbx1425 制作的对 MTR 模组本体的实验性扩展功能。作为 MTR 开发贡献者之一，作者希望对这些新颖的功能作为独立扩展模组先行发布、展示与实验，并将稳定的部分稍后合并入 MTR 本体中。
